title: MSI/setup.exe missing in Assets v5.4.1
body:
### Issue Description

Describe your issue

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v5.4.1
2. scroll down to Assets
3. there is no setup.exe or .msi to download.


### Describe the results you received

there is no setup.exe or .msi to download.

### Describe the results you expected

A setup.exe or .msi to download.

### podman info output

```yaml
I am trying to follow the Windows installation documentation for v5.4.1
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
For now I will use v5.3.2 there I could find a setup.exe.
But maybe something in the build pipeline has gone wrong that the setup.exe isn't able to be build anymore.
